metadata.title: Note UID Generator
metadata.description: Automatically or manually generates Unique IDs (UIDs) for notes and registers them in metadata (frontmatter).

regex.source: .setDesc('The name of the key for the UID in frontmatter (e.g., "uid", "id"). No spaces.')
regex.target: .setDesc('frontmatter中UID的密钥名称（例如，“UID”、“id”）。没有空格。')

regex.source: .setDesc("Generate UIDs only for notes in this folder (and subfolders).")
regex.target: .setDesc("仅为此文件夹（及其子文件夹）中的笔记生成UID。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Folders excluded from automatic UID generation. Click button to manage.")
regex.target: .setDesc("从自动UID生成中排除的文件夹。单击按钮进行管理。")

regex.source: .setDesc(`Manually scan notes based on the current 'Generation Scope' and 'Excluded Folders' settings above. Add a ${this.plugin.settings.uidKey} to any applicable notes that don't already have one. This may take time for large vaults.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`根据上述当前的“生成范围”和“排除文件夹”设置手动扫描笔记。将${this.plugin.settings.uidKey}添加到任何尚未添加的适用笔记中。对于大型保险库来说，这可能需要时间。`)

regex.source: .setDesc("Format string used when copying title and UID, and the UID exists.")
regex.target: .setDesc("复制标题和UID时使用的格式字符串，UID存在。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Format string used when copying, but the note has no UID.")
regex.target: .setDesc("复制时使用的格式字符串，但注释没有UID。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Specify the vault path to remove UIDs from notes within.")
regex.target: .setDesc("指定vault路径以从中的注释中删除UID。")

regex.source: .setDesc(`WARNING: This permanently removes the "${this.plugin.settings.uidKey}" metadata from notes in the specified folder/subfolders and temporarily disables auto-generation.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`警告：这将从指定文件夹/子文件夹中的笔记中永久删除“${This.plugin.settings.uidKey}”元数据，并暂时禁用自动生成。`)

regex.source: .setTooltip("Scan and add missing UIDs respecting scope/exclusions")
regex.target: .setTooltip("扫描并添加关于范围/排除的缺失UID")

regex.source: .createEl("p",{text:`Are you sure you want to remove the '${this.uidKey}' metadata property from all notes within the folder "${this.folderPath}" and its subfolders?`})
regex.target: .createEl("p“，{text:`您确定要从文件夹”${this.folderPath}中的所有笔记中删除“${this.uidKey}”元数据属性吗" and its subfolders?`})

regex.source: .createEl("p",{text:"Add or remove folders from the automatic UID generation exclusion list."})
regex.target: .createEl("p”，{text:“在自动UID生成排除列表中添加或删除文件夹。"})

regex.source: .createEl("p",{text:`Automatically add a ${this.plugin.settings.uidKey} to notes when they are created or opened, if they don't already have one.`})
regex.target: .createEl("p",{text:`Automatically add a ${this.plugin.settings.uidKey} to notes when they are created or opened, if they don't already have one.`})

regex.source: .createEl("p",{text:"Define the format for copied text using placeholders: {title}, {uid}, {uidKey}."})
regex.target: .createEl("p”，{text:“使用占位符定义复制文本的格式：{title}，{uid}，{uidKey}。"})
